scripts.qa:anchor: rolldown qa/anchor-qa.ts -o qa/dist/anchor-qa.mjs --format esm && node qa/dist/anchor-qa.mjs
scripts.qa:extractor: rolldown qa/extractor-qa.ts -o qa/dist/extractor-qa.mjs --format esm --platform node --external jsdom && node qa/dist/extractor-qa.mjs
scripts.qa:scrap: rolldown qa/scrap-qa.ts -o qa/dist/scrap-qa.mjs --format esm --platform node --transform.define "import.meta.env:{}" && node qa/dist/scrap-qa.mjs
scripts.qa:session: rolldown qa/session-qa.ts -o qa/dist/session-qa.mjs --format esm --platform node && node qa/dist/session-qa.mjs
scripts.qa:relations: rolldown qa/relations-qa.ts -o qa/dist/relations-qa.mjs --format esm --platform node && node qa/dist/relations-qa.mjs
scripts.qa:quiz-stream: rolldown qa/quiz-stream-qa.ts -o qa/dist/quiz-stream-qa.mjs --format esm --platform node --transform.define "import.meta.env:{}" && node qa/dist/quiz-stream-qa.mjs
